name: Fidelity Bank of Texas
description_short: Fidelity Bank of Texas is a community bank headquartered in Waco offering checking, savings, money market accounts, and home loans with 24-hour telephone banking and online services.
description_long:
Fidelity Bank of Texas is a traditional community bank located in Waco, Texas, established to serve local customers and businesses in central Texas. The bank operates from its main branch at 1901 W. Lake Shore Drive and is regulated under NMLS# 586644, indicating full federal oversight and compliance with banking standards.

The bank offers a range of deposit products including checking accounts, savings accounts (standard and for minors), money market accounts, and tiered Advantage Accounts designed for larger balances. They provide modern banking conveniences such as online banking, mobile banking, remote check deposit, 24-hour telephone banking, ATM access, and night deposit services. Home lending is a core service, supporting customers who want to build, buy, or refinance properties. Business accounts are available with verification of ownership requirements.

Fidelity Bank differentiates itself through personalized service typical of community banks, offering free notary services to account holders and maintaining relatively low minimum opening balances for some products ($25-$100 for basic savings). The bank provides tiered interest rates on Advantage Accounts based on daily balance levels, rewarding larger depositors. Their emphasis on traditional banking relationships and local presence distinguishes them from larger national or digital-only alternatives.

As a regional bank, Fidelity Bank of Texas serves customers seeking community-focused banking rather than the broader product ecosystem of national institutions. However, prospective customers should verify current interest rates and APYs by calling directly, as these are not disclosed online. The maintenance fees ($3-$10 per statement cycle) and transaction limits (6 transfers, 3 debits) are standard but worth comparing against other banks. This bank is best suited for customers prioritizing local relationships and in-person service over cutting-edge digital features.
services: Tiered Advantage Accounts with balance-based interest rates
pros: Low minimum opening balances for savings ($100) and minor savings ($25) accounts
Tiered interest rates on Advantage Accounts rewarding higher balances ($9,999, $99,999, and $100,000+ tiers)
Free notary service included for account holders
24-hour telephone banking for after-hours account access
Mobile banking and remote check deposit for digital convenience
Home lending services including build, buy, and refinance options
Business savings accounts available with quarterly compounding
cons: Interest rates and APYs not disclosed online; customers must call to learn current rates
Monthly/quarterly maintenance fees ($3-$10) imposed if balance falls below $100-$1,500 depending on account type
Limited transaction allowances (6 transfers, 3 debits per statement cycle) with $3-$10 excessive transaction fees
Single physical location in Waco, Texas limiting branch accessibility for non-local customers
Website lacks transparency on mortgage rates, terms, and loan products beyond 'Home Loans' mention
best_for: Waco and central Texas residents seeking community bank relationships with local service
Customers with $10,000+ to deposit seeking tiered interest rate benefits on Advantage Accounts
Small business owners needing business savings accounts with low opening requirements
Home buyers in the Waco area seeking local mortgage lending relationships
diagnosis: Fidelity Bank of Texas is best for Waco-area residents and businesses seeking traditional community banking with personalized service and competitive tiered savings rates. The main caveat is that interest rates are not disclosed online, requiring direct contact with the bank, and maintenance fees plus transaction limits apply to most accounts, so customers should verify costs against larger national banks before opening accounts.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Fidelity Bank of Texas in Waco offers checking, savings, money market accounts, and home loans with 24-hour telephone banking.
